message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Memverifikasi SPT BKA

actor "AdministratorTU" as Admin
participant "Dashboard_V" as DashboardV
participant "KontrolSPTBKA_V" as KontrolSPTBKAV
participant "Admin_C" as AdminC
participant "KontroSPT_C" as KontroSPTC
participant "SuratPerintahTugas_E" as SuratPerintahTugasE

AdminC -> DashboardV: 1 load->view()
DashboardV --> Admin: 2 Halaman Dashboard
Admin -> DashboardV: 3 klik menu SPT BKA
DashboardV -> KontroSPTC: 4 kontrolsptbka()
KontroSPTC -> SuratPerintahTugasE: 5
SuratPerintahTugasE --> KontroSPTC: 6
KontroSPTC -> KontrolSPTBKAV: 7 load->view()
KontrolSPTBKAV --> Admin: 8 Halaman SPT BKA
Admin -> KontrolSPTBKAV: 9 klik tombol Accept SPT BKA
KontrolSPTBKAV -> KontroSPTC: 10 acceptsptbkalengkap()
KontroSPTC -> SuratPerintahTugasE: 11
SuratPerintahTugasE --> KontroSPTC: 12
KontroSPTC -> KontrolSPTBKAV: 13 load->view()
KontrolSPTBKAV --> Admin: 14 Halaman SPT BKA

@enduml
```
